RegLoan Bank — Dealer Vehicle Invoice Document INV-0003 Page 1 of 1 Dealer: CityDrive VIN: VIN10856AL Charges Line Description Qty Unit ($) Amount ($) 1 Nissan Leaf base 1 38,166 38,166 2 Destination fee 1 904 904 3 Options package 1 1,814 1,814 4 Doc fee 1 437 437 5 Tax 1 3,729 3,729 Total: $45,050
